title: Mission run-record
description: Curated, schema-validated record of one mission, WRITTEN by the orchestrator (never synthesized by a second model — constitution §7). Lands in claude-fieldnotes/mission_records/<run-id>.json. The evolution loop reads these; a record is the only valid evidence for an amendment proposal.

constitution_version.description: Governing version. REQUIRED — the evolution loop must not compare records across regimes (§7).

plan_vs_executed.description: How reality diverged from the frozen plan — the raw material for cap/rule calibration.

cap_hits.description: Every node that hit a cap. The audit's later judgment (would_have_converged) is the calibration signal.

would_have_converged.description: Audit judgment: was the cap-hit effort-shaped (true → raise candidate) or structural (false → cap was right)?

defect_ledger.description: Known shortfalls in the delivered artifact (§5).

human_review.description: Filled by /mission-accept when the Human reviews. THE GOLD SIGNAL (§7): the diff between delivered and accepted is ground truth for where the framework misjudged.

human_diff_stat.description: git diff --stat between delivered tree and accepted (post-edit) tree. Large diff on a node the framework self-closed = a verification gap.

human_diff_summary.description: Short human/orchestrator note on WHAT changed and why — the categorized lesson.

blocker_verdicts.description: Escalation-precision telemetry: was each human-escalated blocker legit or noise? A falling legit-rate is evidence for tightening critic prompts (§3.3).

accepted.description: Did the Human merge the agent branch (with or without edits)?
